description: Style NoteThis ethnic wear kurta by aurelia succeeds in combining traditional floral motifs with design sensibilities of young, modern indian women.Product DetailsCream kurta with all over print, round neck with slit, embroidered piping in blue at neck, patch with unusual weave at sleeve and bottom hem, three quarter sleeve and vented hem Material and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shade inside outHot iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5’8” , chest 33” and waist 28”) is wearing a size M
